en: The hand of the LORD was upon me, and he brought me out in the Spirit of the LORD and set me down in the middle of the valley; it was full of bones.
zh: 耶和華的手按在我身上；耶和華藉著他的靈領我出去，把我放在平原上，這平原布滿了骸骨。

en: And he led me around among them, and behold, there were very many on the surface of the valley, and behold, they were very dry.
zh: 他帶我在骸骨的四圍經過；我看見平原上面有很多骸骨，都非常枯乾。

en: And he said to me, "Son of man, can these bones live?" And I answered, "O Lord GOD, you know."
zh: 他問我：“人子啊！這些骸骨能活過來嗎？”我回答：“主耶和華啊！唯有你才知道。”

en: Then he said to me, "Prophesy over these bones, and say to them, O dry bones, hear the word of the LORD.
zh: 他又對我說：“你要向這些骸骨說預言，對它們說：‘枯乾的骸骨啊！你們要聽耶和華的話。

en: Thus says the Lord GOD to these bones: Behold, I will cause breath to enter you, and you shall live.
zh: 主耶和華對這些骸骨這樣說：看哪！我必使氣息進入你們裡面，你們就活過來了。

en: And I will lay sinews upon you, and will cause flesh to come upon you, and cover you with skin, and put breath in you, and you shall live, and you shall know that I am the LORD."
zh: 我必使你們生筋長肉，給你們包上皮，又把氣息放入你們裡面，你們必活過來；你們就知道我是耶和華。’”

en: So I prophesied as I was commanded. And as I prophesied, there was a sound, and behold, a rattling, and the bones came together, bone to its bone.
zh: 於是我遵命說預言；我正在說預言的時候，就聽見有響聲，骨頭與骨頭互相結合起來，格格作響。

en: And I looked, and behold, there were sinews on them, and flesh had come upon them, and skin had covered them. But there was no breath in them.
zh: 我觀看，見骸骨生了筋，長了肉，又有皮包在上面，只是它們裡面還沒有氣息。

en: Then he said to me, "Prophesy to the breath; prophesy, son of man, and say to the breath, Thus says the Lord GOD: Come from the four winds, O breath, and breathe on these slain, that they may live."
zh: 他對我說：“你要向氣息說預言。人子啊！你要說預言。你要向氣息說：‘主耶和華這樣說：氣息啊！你要從四方 而來，吹在這些被殺的人身上，使它們活過來。’”

en: So I prophesied as he commanded me, and the breath came into them, and they lived and stood on their feet, an exceedingly great army.
zh: 於是我遵命說預言，氣息就進入骸骨裡面，骸骨就活過來，並且站起，成了一支極大的軍隊。

en: Then he said to me, "Son of man, these bones are the whole house of Israel. Behold, they say, 'Our bones are dried up, and our hope is lost; we are clean cut off.'
zh: 他對我說：“人子啊！這些骸骨就是以色列全家；他們常說：‘我們的骸骨枯乾了，我們的盼望消失了；我們都滅亡了。’

en: Therefore prophesy, and say to them, Thus says the Lord GOD: Behold, I will open your graves and raise you from your graves, O my people. And I will bring you into the land of Israel.
zh: 因此，你要說預言，對他們說：‘主耶和華這樣說：我的子民哪！我要打開你們的墳墓，把你們從墳墓中領上來，帶你們回以色列地去。

en: And you shall know that I am the LORD, when I open your graves, and raise you from your graves, O my people.
zh: 我的子民哪！我打開你們的墳墓，把你們從墳墓中領上來的時候，你們就知道我是耶和華。

en: And I will put my Spirit within you, and you shall live, and I will place you in your own land. Then you shall know that I am the LORD; I have spoken, and I will do it, declares the LORD."
zh: 我要把我的靈放在你們裡面，你們就活過來；我要把你們安頓在你們的土地上，你們就知道我耶和華說了，就必實行。這是主耶和華的宣告。’”

en: The word of the LORD came to me:
zh: 耶和華的話又臨到我說：

en: "Son of man, take a stick and write on it, 'For Judah, and the people of Israel associated with him'; then take another stick and write on it, 'For Joseph (the stick of Ephraim) and all the house of Israel associated with him.'
zh: “人子啊！你要拿一根木杖，在上面寫‘猶大和那些與他一起的以色列人’；又拿另一根木杖，在上面寫‘以法蓮的木杖，就是約瑟和與他一起的以色列全家’。

en: And join them one to another into one stick, that they may become one in your hand.
zh: 你要把這兩根木杖連接在一起，使它們在你手裡成為一根。

en: And when your people say to you, 'Will you not tell us what you mean by these?'
zh: 如果你本國的人民問你：‘你不告訴我們這些木杖是甚麼意思嗎？’

en: say to them, Thus says the Lord GOD: Behold, I am about to take the stick of Joseph (that is in the hand of Ephraim) and the tribes of Israel associated with him. And I will join with it the stick of Judah, and make them one stick, that they may be one in my hand.
zh: 你就要回答他們：‘主耶和華這樣說：看哪！我要拿約瑟和與他一起的以色列眾支派的木杖，就是在以法蓮手裡的，跟猶大的木杖連接在一起，使它們在我手裡成為一根。’

en: When the sticks on which you write are in your hand before their eyes,
zh: 你寫上了字的那兩根木杖，要在他們眼前握在手裡；

en: then say to them, Thus says the Lord GOD: Behold, I will take the people of Israel from the nations among which they have gone, and will gather them from all around, and bring them to their own land.
zh: 你要對他們說：‘主耶和華這樣說：看哪！我要把以色列人從他們所到的列國中領出來，又從四圍聚集他們，把他們領回故土。

en: And I will make them one nation in the land, on the mountains of Israel. And one king shall be king over them all, and they shall be no longer two nations, and no longer divided into two kingdoms.
zh: 我要使他們在那地上，在以色列的眾山上，成為一國；必有一王統治他們眾人；他們不再是兩個國，不再分為兩個邦。

en: They shall not defile themselves anymore with their idols and their detestable things, or with any of their transgressions. But I will save them from all the backslidings in which they have sinned, and will cleanse them; and they shall be my people, and I will be their God.
zh: 他們必不再因自己的偶像和可憎的像，以及一切過犯，而玷污自己；我必拯救他們脫離一切背道的罪 ；我必潔淨他們，他們就必作我的子民，我必作他們的 神。

en: "My servant David shall be king over them, and they shall all have one shepherd. They shall walk in my rules and be careful to obey my statutes.
zh: “‘我的僕人大衛必作他們的王；他們眾人只有一個牧者。他們必遵行我的典章，謹守實行我的律例。

en: They shall dwell in the land that I gave to my servant Jacob, where your fathers lived. They and their children and their children's children shall dwell there forever, and David my servant shall be their prince forever.
zh: 他們必住在我所賜給我僕人雅各的地上，就是你們列祖所住的地。他們和他們的子孫，以及子孫的子孫，都必永遠住在那裡；我的僕人大衛必永遠作他們的領袖。

en: I will make a covenant of peace with them. It shall be an everlasting covenant with them. And I will set them in their land and multiply them, and will set my sanctuary in their midst forevermore.
zh: 我要與他們立平安的約，是一個永遠的約；我必堅立他們，使他們人數增多，又在他們中間設立我的聖所，直到永遠。

en: My dwelling place shall be with them, and I will be their God, and they shall be my people.
zh: 我的居所必在他們當中；我要作他們的 神，他們要作我的子民。

en: Then the nations will know that I am the LORD who sanctifies Israel, when my sanctuary is in their midst forevermore."
zh: 我的聖所必永遠在他們中間，列國就知道我是耶和華，是我使以色列成聖的。’”
